      "source": [
        "# ⚠️ Import Libraries\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "\n",
        "# ⚠️ Load Data\n",
        "df = pd.read_csv('/content/customer_churn (2).csv')\n",
        "\n",
        "# ⚠️ Basic Info\n",
        "print(\"Shape:\", df.shape)\n",
        "print(df.info())\n",
        "print(df.describe())\n",
        "\n",
        "# ⚠️ Data Cleaning\n",
        "df.dropna(inplace=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# The 'Churn' column is already numerical (0 or 1) in the loaded data.\n",
        "# Assign it directly to 'Churn_numeric' for model training.\n",
        "df['Churn_numeric'] = df['Churn']\n",
        "\n",
        "# Convert 'Churn_numeric' to string for plotting purposes.\n",
        "df['Churn'] = df['Churn_numeric'].astype(str) # Use this 'Churn' for plotting\n",
        "\n",
        "# 📊 ------------------ EDA ------------------\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Churn Distribution\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "sns.countplot(x='Churn', data=df)\n",
        "plt.title(\"Churn Distribution\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "plt.close()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Gender vs Churn - Fixed: Replaced 'gender' with 'PaperlessBilling' as 'gender' column does not exist.\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "sns.countplot(x='PaperlessBilling', hue='Churn', data=df)\n",
        "plt.title(\"PaperlessBilling vs Churn\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "plt.close()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Contract vs Churn\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "sns.countplot(x='Contract', hue='Churn', data=df)\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=30)\n",
        "plt.title(\"Contract vs Churn\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "plt.close()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Monthly Charges\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "sns.boxplot(x='Churn', y='MonthlyCharges', data=df)\n",
        "plt.title(\"Monthly Charges vs Churn\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "plt.close()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Tenure vs Churn\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "sns.boxplot(x='Churn', y='Tenure', data=df)\n",
        "plt.title(\"Tenure vs Churn\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "plt.close()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 📊 Correlation\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))\n",
        "sns.heatmap(df.corr(numeric_only=True), annot=True)\n",
        "plt.title(\"Correlation Heatmap\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "plt.close()\n",
        "\n",
        "# ⚠️ ------------------ ML MODEL ------------------\n",
        "\n",
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, confusion_matrix\n",
        "\n",
        "# Separate target variable (y) and features (X) BEFORE one-hot encoding\n",
        "y = df['Churn_numeric']\n",
        "\n",
        "# Drop CustomerID, the original 'Churn' (string for plotting), and the numerical 'Churn_numeric' from features\n",
        "X = df.drop(columns=['CustomerID', 'Churn', 'Churn_numeric'])\n",
        "\n",
        "# Convert categorical features in X using one-hot encoding\n",
        "X = pd.get_dummies(X, drop_first=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(X, y, test_size=0.2)\n",
        "\n",
        "model = LogisticRegression(max_iter=1000)\n",
        "model.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "\n",
        "y_pred = model.predict(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Accuracy:\", accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred))\n",
        "print(\"Confusion Matrix:\\n\", confusion_matrix(y_test, y_pred))\n"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
